## Source: amazon-inspector (152509a4bd82adf6364c22476faa63746b5ddc6649dd64a7fdf96ff5e67ebc13)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (6dfef2aa5b1531e49858972a00975d216023431edb51a77bfb48daff095f6b58)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@3stripes/auth' @ 999.0.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
